description: Enhance the shared shell/layout components (AppShell, Sidebar, TopBar, BottomNav) and state components (EmptyState, ErrorState, LoadingState, SuccessState) with entrance animations using the new Motion primitives. Also add global responsive CSS improvements. The key constraint is: existing prop interfaces must NOT break - animations are additive.
steps: Update packages/shared-ui/src/components/Layout/AppShell.tsx: Wrap the main content area with PageTransition so page content fades in. Add an optional 'animated' prop (default true) that enables/disables the animation. Do NOT change existing props.

Update packages/shared-ui/src/components/Layout/Sidebar.tsx: Add smooth width transition using framer-motion's motion.nav with animate width based on collapsed state. Use brand spring.stiff for the sidebar collapse animation. Keep existing CSS transition as fallback. Add optional 'animated' prop (default true).

Update packages/shared-ui/src/components/Navigation/TopBar.tsx: Add a subtle entrance animation (slide down from -10px + fade in) when the component mounts using FadeIn with direction='down'. Add optional 'animated' prop (default true).

Update packages/shared-ui/src/components/Navigation/BottomNav.tsx: Add an animated indicator (small dot or bar) under the active tab that slides between tabs using framer-motion's layoutId. Add entrance animation for the entire bar (slide up from bottom). Add optional 'animated' prop (default true).
Update packages/shared-ui/src/components/States/EmptyState.tsx: Wrap content in FadeIn animation with a slight scale entrance. Keep all existing props unchanged.
Update packages/shared-ui/src/components/States/ErrorState.tsx: Add entrance animation - icon gets a gentle bounce entrance (spring.bouncy), text fades in. Keep all existing props unchanged.

Update packages/shared-ui/src/components/States/LoadingState.tsx: Enhance spinner variant with smoother rotation via framer-motion animate. Add pulse animation to dots variant. Keep all existing props unchanged.
Update packages/shared-ui/src/components/States/SuccessState.tsx: Add checkmark draw animation (SVG path animation) on entrance plus FadeIn for text. Keep all existing props unchanged.
Ensure all animation-enhanced components respect prefers-reduced-motion (fall back to no animation). Use the MotionConfig context or framer-motion's useReducedMotion.
Run pnpm typecheck to confirm all 111 packages pass
Run pnpm build to confirm all 88 packages pass
acceptance_criteria: AppShell, Sidebar, TopBar, BottomNav still accept all their original props without breaking
New 'animated' prop is optional and defaults to true on Layout/Nav components
State components (Empty, Error, Loading, Success) have entrance animations
No new peer dependencies added (framer-motion is already in shared-ui from FEAT-001)
